hooks.command: jq -r '.prompt' | grep -qiE '(spent|paid|earned|salary|income|balance|mortgage|debt|loan|saving|invest|portfolio|budget|transaction|receipt|statement|transfer|withdraw|deposit|‚Ç¨|\$|¬£|PLN|[0-9]+[.,][0-9]{2})' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: The user has provided financial data. Save it to .finance/ immediately using the appropriate script (add_transaction, add_holding, update_profile, etc.) BEFORE answering their question. Confirm what was saved in one line."}}' || true
jq -c '{ts: now | todate, session: .session_id, tool: .tool_name, file: (.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // null)}' >> ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl 2>/dev/null || true

[ -f ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl ] && COUNT=$(wc -l < ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl) && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"üì• Finance data saved ‚Äî $COUNT entries logged to ~/.finance/input-log.jsonl\"}" || true
